description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that runs docker info and logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add build_debian10, build_debian8, and build_debian9 jobs that except the master branch, set DISTRO and TAG variables, and execute "docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG -f Dockerfile.$DISTRO ." followed by "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG". In the test stage add test_debian10, test_debian8, and test_debian9 jobs that except the master branch, set DISTRO, INIT and TAG variables, then run "docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker run --name $CONTAINER_ID -d --privileged -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:ro $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE:$TAG $INIT", and "docker exec --tty $CONTAINER_ID env TERM=xterm ansible --version". In the release stage add release_image_debian10, release_image_debian8, release_image_debian9, and release_image_latest jobs that only run on the master branch, set RELEASE_TAG and TAG variables, and run "docker pull $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG", "docker tag $CONTAINER_DEV_IMAGE:$TAG $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG", and "docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE:$RELEASE_TAG".
